summary: Classification: basic, because Priya has relevant internship experience in data engineering (ETL, data warehousing, Airflow, dbt) but has not yet held a full-time DE role, so the plan emphasizes advanced specialization and a strong portfolio with an application phase.

phases.title: Advanced Data Engineering Foundations (ETL, Data Warehousing, Cloud basics)
phases.description: Intensive advanced topics to bridge internship exposure to real-world data engineering responsibilities.

items: Study window functions, CTEs, partitioning
Practice with explain plans on sample queries
Rewrite provided complex query for performance
Design star schema for a sample analytics domain
Create dbt models and sources/refs
Implement dbt tests (unique, not_null, relationships)
Document lineage and dependencies
Build an Airflow DAG skeleton with ingest, transform, load tasks
Implement retries, SLA, and basic monitoring
Set up S3/GCS bucket and basic IAM permissions
Configure environment for local vs cloud runs

phases.title: End-to-end Pipeline Portfolio Project
phases.description: Build a portfolio-grade pipeline ingesting CSV to warehouse with Airflow and dbt.

items: Define dataset (CSV with 5 fields) and create sample file
Set up Git repo and project structure
Outline DAG structure and data sources
Create DAG with tasks: ingest_csv, transform_with_dbt, load_to_warehouse
Implement scheduling and dependencies
Add simple logging and retry policy
Develop dbt models for staging and mart
Write tests: unique ID, not_null, relationships
Document models and lineage
Load data into Postgres/BigQuery/Redshift
Apply partitioning and indexing strategies
Validate data quality and row counts
Set up basic CI for the pipeline
Add Airflow task-level and DAG-level metrics
Create README with run instructions and architecture diagram
Produce 2-minute demo video linked in repo
Prepare a brief snapshot of pipeline performance

phases.title: Interview & Evaluation Practice
phases.description: Structured mock interviews and problem-solving drills.

items: 2x 45-minute mock interviews: ETL design and SQL optimization
Review common DE questions and sample answers
5 design prompts focusing on data pipelines and scalability
Practice explaining tradeoffs: Postgres vs BigQuery vs Redshift

phases.title: Entry-level Data Engineer Job Search & Applications
phases.description: Target startups in Austin; prepare resume, portfolio, and outreach.

items: Tailor resume to pipeline project; create portfolio page
Draft 3 outreach emails to Austin startups
Update LinkedIn and GitHub with project links
Apply to 15 roles; target 10 startups in Austin
Schedule 3-4 phone screens; gather feedback from mock interviews
Refine pitch and STAR stories
